action_text: Run the reports list search with the current query
rationale: We’ve already typed “Incidents by Assigned to” into the list search; executing the search is the most direct way to find the report.

action_text: Type "Incidents by" into the reports list search field
rationale: Broaden the search to a more general phrase likely matching the report title, then we can execute it.

action_text: Clear the reports list search field
rationale: Current filters yield no results; clearing the search resets the list so we can try a different approach.

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter builder for the reports list
rationale: Using the list’s filter builder will let us add a condition like Title contains “Assigned to,” precisely targeting the needed report.

action_text: Click the Global tab for the reports list
rationale: The standard “Incidents by Assigned To” report is typically in the Global scope; ensuring we’re on that tab may reveal it.
